calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Susan Lee.
Petitioner:YU HUI HUANG AND QUI PING ZHANG, present as Guardians Ad Litem for Minors: CHENG KANG HUAN AND JIA QI HUANG Cantonese Interpreter: WILLIAM QUAN. Petiitoners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minors to: JASON CHENGKANG HUANG AND AMY JIAQI HUANG.
Decree signed in open court.
